PreToolUse.windows: powershell -NonInteractive -Command "$input_json = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $tool = $input_json.tool_name; $input_data = $input_json.tool_input | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; $dangerous = $false; $reason = ''; if ($tool -eq 'run_in_terminal') { $cmd = $input_data; if ($cmd -match 'rm\s+-rf|Remove-Item\s+-Recurse\s+-Force|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|DROP\s+TABLE|DROP\s+DATABASE|TRUNCATE\s+TABLE|az\s+.*delete|az\s+.*remove') { $dangerous = $true; $reason = 'This command is potentially destructive and irreversible.' } }; if ($tool -eq 'create_file' -or $tool -eq 'replace_string_in_file') { $path = ($input_json.tool_input.filePath ?? $input_json.tool_input.path ?? ''); if ($path -match '\.github/hooks|\.vscode/mcp\.json') { $dangerous = $true; $reason = 'Modifying a security-sensitive config file (.github/hooks or mcp.json).' } }; if ($dangerous) { @{ hookSpecificOutput = @{ hookEventName = 'PreToolUse'; permissionDecision = 'ask'; permissionDecisionReason = $reason } } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } else { @{ continue = $true } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }"
PreToolUse.linux: bash -c 'input=$(cat); tool=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"tool_name\",\"\"))"); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps(d.get(\"tool_input\",{})))"); dangerous=false; reason=""; if [ "$tool" = "run_in_terminal" ]; then if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE "rm -rf|git push --force|git reset --hard|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|TRUNCATE TABLE|az .* delete"; then dangerous=true; reason="This command is potentially destructive and irreversible."; fi; fi; if $dangerous; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"ask\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"$reason\"}}"; else echo "{\"continue\":true}"; fi'
PreToolUse.osx: bash -c 'input=$(cat); tool=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"tool_name\",\"\"))"); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps(d.get(\"tool_input\",{})))"); dangerous=false; reason=""; if [ "$tool" = "run_in_terminal" ]; then if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE "rm -rf|git push --force|git reset --hard|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|TRUNCATE TABLE|az .* delete"; then dangerous=true; reason="This command is potentially destructive and irreversible."; fi; fi; if $dangerous; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"ask\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"$reason\"}}"; else echo "{\"continue\":true}"; fi'
